modmenu.summaryTranslation.mes: Lots of Vanilla styled structures to fill up the end dimension with life!
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.mes: Moog's End Structures breathes new life into the End dimension by introducing a range of new structures that blend perfectly with the existing landscape. Each structure is crafted with care using vanilla blocks and entities to keep that classic Minecraft feel. As you explore the End, you'll come across unique challenges, tough enemies, and valuable loot. This mod works with any modpack and can be installed alongside Moog's Voyager Structures (MVS) for an even richer gameplay experience. Dive into the End with Moog's End Structures and discover the hidden treasures that await!
